raw: {"perspective": "Assessment Science", "summary": "VOLAURA's 28-day progress is exceptionally rapid. External benchmarks suggest this pace is unsustainable and potentially reckless.", "key_sources": ["Y Combinator's Startup Library", "Techstars' Accelerator Programs", "Paul Graham's Essays on Startup Velocity"], "gaps_in_current_canon": "Lack of direct comparison to solo-founder startups with similar budgets and team sizes", "proposed_action": "Conduct a thorough risk assessment and adjust the development pace to prioritize stability and sustainability", "whistleblower_flag": "Potential burnout and decreased product quality due to excessive speed"}
summary: VOLAURA's 28-day progress is exceptionally rapid. External benchmarks suggest this pace is unsustainable and potentially reckless.
key_sources: Paul Graham's Essays on Startup Velocity
gaps_in_current_canon: Lack of direct comparison to solo-founder startups with similar budgets and team sizes
proposed_action: Conduct a thorough risk assessment and adjust the development pace to prioritize stability and sustainability
whistleblower_flag: Potential burnout and decreased product quality due to excessive speed
